items.description: Research common attacks in the exploitation phase of WiFi pentesting, focusing on techniques such as packet sniffing, deauthentication attacks, and evil twin attacks.
Gather detailed evidence and data points on each identified attack technique, including methods, tools used, and potential impacts.
Compile findings into a structured format, categorizing attacks and techniques for clarity.
Cite all sources used in the research to ensure credibility and allow for further reading.
